commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add PNG icon build step and update documentation

- set_icon.cpp: Haiku helper that scales toolkit.png to 32×32/16×16,

  update project structure, update license section
- BRIEF.md: update file structure and build sections to match

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

  with global-error.tsx (both previously exported GlobalError)

Reduces image attack surface by not installing unnecessary recommended
packages alongside gcc and libpq-dev in the backend Docker image.

merge: integrate main (CAE sub-tabs + Railway overhaul) into sanarQubIssuesFIxes

- backend/Dockerfile: combined non-root user security fix with start.sh entrypoint,
  merged consecutive RUN instructions into one layer
- frontend/components/modules/cae-tab.tsx: took main's rewrite (sub-tabs + useToast),
  our alert() fix was already absorbed
- PROGRESS.md: manual merge, appended Etape 14

ci: add type-check script and suppress S1128 for app pages

- Add `type-check` npm script (tsc --noEmit) to frontend/package.json
  to catch type-import regressions like the Phase 8 RequiredFieldsForm/CalendarView incident
- Suppress typescript:S1128 (unused imports) on frontend/app/** in sonar-project.properties
  to avoid false positives on JSX component imports that SonarCloud misidentifies as type-only

Ping agent now only records metrics and updates last_ping_at.
Status (online/offline) is managed exclusively by auth_agent.

commit.message:
Add full map intelligence layers + location search + elevation HUD

- Zip code/address/place search via Mapbox Geocoding API
- High-zoom flyTo (zoom 13, 60° pitch) for spot-level terrain view
- Geolocate button now flies to GPS location with auto state detection
- 7 overlay layers from free Mapbox tilesets:
  - Wetlands (landuse_overlay: wetland, wetland_noveg)
  - Land Cover (terrain-v2: crop, wood, grass, scrub)
  - Agriculture (landuse: agriculture)
  - Parks (landuse: park)
  - Waterways (waterway: river, stream, canal, intermittent)
  - Contour Lines (terrain-v2: contour with elevation labels in ft)
  - Trails (road: track, path)
- LayersPanel component with grouped toggles (Water/Terrain/Land)
- Elevation HUD shows feet on mouse move when 3D terrain active
- Named sources for streets-v8 and terrain-v2 (shared, no duplicate fetches)
- Draw tools installed (@mapbox/mapbox-gl-draw + @turf/turf)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

SEO ותוכן: שיפור מטא תגיות, Schema Markup, שכתוב תוכן

- title ו-meta description עם מילות מפתח וראשון לציון
- Open Graph לשיתוף ברשתות חברתיות
- Schema Markup מסוג MedicalBusiness עם שירותים ודירוג
- שכתוב סקשן אודות: מכללת רידמן, ניסיון, אבחון מעמיק
- שכתוב תיאורי שירותים: ספציפיים עם משך טיפול
- שיפור alt תמונות עם מילות מפתח
- שילוב ראשון לציון בטקסטי סקשנים
- תיקון שגיאת כתיב: בצוואר → בצוותא

commit.message:
Add tenant-id extraction middleware and dependency

FastAPI middleware + dependency for multi-tenancy plumbing:
- TenantMiddleware sets request.state.tenant_id and binds it
  to structlog context for every request
- get_tenant_id dependency for use in endpoint signatures
- MVP: hardcoded "default" tenant, extraction method ready
  to swap to JWT/API-key lookup in Phase 5
- Context is always cleared after request (including on errors)

fix: install aider binary to /usr/local/bin for PATH visibility (#177)

uv tool install defaults to /root/.local/bin which is not on the
vscode user's PATH. Set UV_TOOL_BIN_DIR=/usr/local/bin so the aider
executable is accessible to all users.

Closes #176

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Linked Sheet feature for embedding Google Sheets and CSV data

Worker: Add /sheets/fetch POST route with CSV parsing, Google Sheets
public export URL detection, and 5-min Cloudflare Cache API caching.

Frontend: New LinkedSheet view component with full Wasabi table styling
(dark theme, client-side sort, text search, auto column type detection,
read-only badge). SheetUrlDialog modal validates URLs and detects sheet
type (Google Sheets, CSV, unsupported providers flagged for future).

Integration: Register linked_sheet in ViewRenderer, add to Navigation
add menu with dialog intercept pattern, new IconSheet SVG icon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: supply snapshot contamination check + hardcode asset IDs

- Change contamination check to only compare recent snapshots (24h)
  with 50% threshold instead of all-time 10%, preventing legitimate
  historical data from being purged as supply changes over time
- Hardcode VAL and PSWAP asset IDs in supply-filler.js to avoid
  JSON object resolution bug that prevented these tokens from being
  captured
- Add CLI token filter support to supply-filler.js (e.g. node
  supply-filler.js VAL PSWAP)

  width like Display Name and X Account sections

  navigating to /profile after connecting on /dashboard

  from right after writeContract() to the isConfirmed effect, so the
  wallet popup actually has time to appear

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

align: full reverse engineering of official Codex Desktop v26.305.950

Reverse-engineered /Applications/Codex.app (Electron 40, React 19, Tailwind v4)
and aligned this Tauri+React project at both feature and architecture levels.

**Design System & Tokens**
- 119 token utility classes (text-token-*, bg-token-*, border-token-*)
- Official animation system: hyperspeed shimmer, curtain, dialog, toast
- Typography, z-index, spacing, border-radius tokens from official CSS
- Tailwind config expanded with 9 border-radius levels, container queries

**IPC Protocol (17 JSON-RPC methods, 31 event types)**
- Thread lifecycle: fork/archive/unarchive/compact/read/rollback/setName
- Turn control: steer (append to running turn)
- Extended thread listing with filters (modelProviders, sourceKinds, archived)
- Account: cancelLogin, initialize handshake with capabilities
- New APIs: modelApi.list, skillsApi, feedbackApi, appApi

**Rust Backend**
- 11 new Tauri commands for thread/turn management
- Automation tables (automations + automation_runs) in SQLite
- IPC bridge types for fork, archive, compact, rollback, steer
- Initialize params with experimentalApi capability

**Settings Store v6**
- Added: enterBehavior, autoContextEnabled, agentMode, skipFullAccessConfirm
- Added: bestOfN (1-5), skipBranchMismatchConfirm
- Migration chain v3→v4→v5→v6 with type guards

**New Settings Pages**
- ConfigurationSettings: agent mode, enter behavior, auto context, fast/plan mode
- UsageSettings: account info, request/token counts, billing period
- ArchivedThreadsSettings: list and unarchive threads
- NotificationSettings: notification mode with SegmentedToggle
- Settings shell expanded to 13 sections matching official

**New UI Components**
- SegmentedToggle: radio group with options, sizes, uniform width
- SkillMentionPopup: $-triggered skill picker
- InlineChip, CodeSnippet, ConnectorLogo
- FindInThread: CSS Custom Highlight API search (Cmd+F)

**Features**
- LoginPage: real serverApi.startLogin() OAuth + API key flows
- ChatInputArea: prompt history (up/down arrows), model selector prep
- Sidebar: thread context menu (pin, unpin, mark unread, archive)
- Shiki syntax highlighting (replaces react-syntax-highlighter)
- Voice dictation hook (MediaRecorder + Whisper API)
- Editor integration (16 editors: VS Code, Cursor, Zed, IntelliJ, etc.)
- Native notifications, global shortcuts, slash commands (/fast, /plan-mode)

**Reverse Engineering Reference**
- reverse/official-v26.305.950-analysis.md: complete protocol analysis
- reverse/official-architecture-v26.305.950.md: architecture deep-dive
- reverse/official-css-v26.305.950.md: 1,136 CSS custom properties
- reverse/editor-icons/: 26 editor integration icons

  DailyScore after every mutation so charts/stats have historical data
- Call persistDailyScore after timer stop, checkbox toggle, manual entry,
  and on dashboard load to ensure every day's score is saved
- Extract assembleDashboardData into src/lib/dashboard.ts (shared by
  page.tsx server render and /api/dashboard route)
- Extract API error handling into src/lib/api.ts (withApiHandler wrapper)
- Architectural improvements across all API routes

Fixes: dashboard showing same data every day, charts showing no data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

research: ETF Flow X-Ray v2 — 시차+규모필터+이벤트스터디 재검증

사용자 직감 기반 4가지 분석 프레임 수정:
1. 시차 분석: T+0(-0.06) → T+1(+0.03) → T+2(+0.03) 상관계수 반전
2. 규모 필터: 상위 20% ETF 유입일 vs 하위 20% 비교
3. 이벤트 스터디: 상위 10% 이벤트 전후 T-3~T+5 프로파일
4. 누적 T+1~T+3: 이벤트 후 기관 순매수 vs 통제 비교

핵심 결과:
- KODEX 반도체→SK하이닉스: +348% (이벤트 vs 통제)
- TIGER 반도체TOP10→SK하이닉스: +468%
- KODEX 은행→KB금융: +151%, 신한지주: +101%
- 삼성전자: NEGATIVE (유동성 과다로 노이즈 압도)

결론: ETF 생성/환매 메커니즘 실재 확인. 시차 보정 필수.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(live): use FAK for BUY orders and disable post_only to prevent GTD rejection

BUY orders were being submitted as GTD+post_only which Polymarket rejects
when the order crosses the spread (INVALID_POST_ONLY_ORDER). Fix:
- execution.post_only: false in local.yaml so plan_buy_execution returns taker plan
- execution.maker_first: false to skip maker-first attempt entirely
- BUY order now explicitly sets order_type=FAK + expiration=0 on taker path
  matching the SELL order behavior at line 2085

fix: make WordPress sync Vite plugin resilient and optional

- Fixed crash on import: migrate.ts top-level CLI code now guarded with
  an ESM main-module check (`process.argv[1] === fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)`)
  so it only runs when invoked directly, not when imported by the plugin
- Fixed argument parsing: parseArgs now only accepts http(s):// URLs as
  the siteUrl, preventing Vite commands like 'build' from being mistaken
  for the WordPress URL
- Added try/catch in wordpress-sync.ts buildStart so network failures
  log a warning and let the build proceed with existing cached content
- Switched vite.config.ts to defineConfig function form and added
  loadEnv() so WP_SITE_URL can be set in .env.local instead of always
  being passed inline on the CLI
- Expanded the main-module guard comment with a clear explanation of
  how process.argv[1] vs import.meta.url differ between direct execution
  and module import

Fix model peek: loop through Twilio messages to find 'start' event

Twilio sends a 'connected' event before 'start', so reading only one
message meant we were missing the 'start' event entirely and always
falling back to the default model. Now we loop up to 5 messages until
we find 'start'. Also added debug logs to make model selection visible.

fix: use subquery for GROUP BY in /api/v1/push/locations

PostgreSQL can't GROUP BY a column alias from a correlated subquery.
Wrap the aggregation in a subquery that groups by store_id, then
resolve store slugs in the outer SELECT.

commit.message:
fix: allow file-read-metadata in sandbox for path resolution

Claude CLI needs lstat/stat on parent directories when resolving paths.
The sandbox denied all reads to PROJECT_DIR, causing EPERM on lstat.
Allow metadata reads (stat/lstat only, not file contents) for the
project directory to fix this.
